channel.title: wpagency.xyz Blog | No-BS WordPress Insights
channel.description: Real talk about WordPress, performance, and web development. No fluff, just facts.

item.title: WordPress Performance in 2024: The No-BS Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about making WordPress fast. No fluff, just facts and proven techniques.
item.author: Theme Team

item.title: WooCommerce at Scale: Running 100K Orders/Month
item.description: How we scaled a WooCommerce store from 500 to 100,000+ monthly orders without switching platforms.
item.author: Theme Team

item.title: Headless WordPress: The Revolution Nobody Talks About
item.description: Why decoupling your WordPress backend is the smartest move you'll make this year.
item.author: Theme Team

item.title: Gutenberg vs Page Builders: The Fight Nobody Wins
item.description: Elementor, Divi, or Gutenberg? Here's why you're asking the wrong question.
item.author: Theme Team

item.title: WordPress Security: Stop Believing These 5 Myths
item.description: Your WordPress site isn't insecure. You are. Here's what actually matters for WP security.
item.author: Theme Team
